metadata.title: YeldoOS — Frontend Developer Portfolio
metadata.description: An interactive developer portfolio presented as an original operating system in the browser.

apps.archiveDescription: Archived items and intentionally empty space

desktop.simplifiedDescription: A conventional list of every YeldoOS application.

palette.title: Command palette
palette.placeholder: Search apps, projects, skills, files, or commands…
palette.empty: No matching actions. Try a project name, skill, or command.
palette.hint: Use arrow keys to navigate and Enter to run

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: No notifications. The system is quiet.
notifications.githubUnavailable: GitHub is unavailable; safe fallback content is shown.
notifications.refreshCooldown: Please wait before refreshing GitHub again.
notifications.offline: You appear to be offline. Local portfolio content still works.

achievements.title: Local achievements
achievements.description: Small milestones for exploring the portfolio. No streaks, points, or pressure.
achievements.keyboardFirstDescription: Open the command palette with the keyboard.

about.intro: I build responsive React and Next.js interfaces, design interaction systems, and develop independent projects that make technical ideas tangible.
about.biography: My current work spans an anime discovery platform, browser-based developer environments, and a Fabric mod for Minecraft. I care about component boundaries, precise UI behavior, accessibility, and honest product framing. I am deepening TypeScript, frontend architecture, 3D web performance, and backend fundamentals.
about.philosophy: Complex interfaces should still have clear paths, predictable state, and a lightweight fallback. Motion earns its place by explaining change, not by decorating every action.
about.educationPlaceholder: Education details have not been published yet.
about.interests: Frontend systems, UI motion, open-source tooling, Linux, anime catalogs, and game/mod development.
about.availabilityPlaceholder: Work availability has not been published yet.

projects.title: Project explorer
projects.subtitle: Independent products, technical experiments, and clearly labeled concepts.
projects.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, technologies, or project details
projects.mediaPlaceholder: Project screenshots and video have not been added yet.

github.title: Public GitHub activity
github.subtitle: Live data from the official GitHub REST API. Private data is never requested.
github.errorDescription: The portfolio remains usable. Static profile links are shown without invented repository statistics.
github.rateLimited: GitHub rate limit reached. Cached or fallback content is shown.
github.timedOut: GitHub took too long to respond.
github.noActivity: No recent public activity was returned by the API.
github.noCommits: No recent commit data is available.
github.contributionsNote: GitHub's public REST API does not provide a reliable total contribution count, so YeldoOS does not fabricate one.

terminal.title: YeldoOS simulated terminal
terminal.simulationNotice: Portfolio simulation — commands do not access your computer.
terminal.help: Commands: help, clear, ls, cd, pwd, cat, whoami, about, projects, skills, github, contact, history, theme, language, open, date, echo, neofetch, git status, git log, npm run dev, sudo, exit
terminal.about: I build typed, responsive interfaces and independent projects with React, Next.js, and careful interaction design.
terminal.skills:
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js
Tools: Git, GitHub, Vercel, Linux
Modding: Java, Fabric, Gradle
Learning: advanced TypeScript, architecture, 3D web, backend fundamentals
terminal.contact:
Telegram: @Yeldomr
GitHub: github.com/TheYeldo
Portfolio: theyeldo.github.io/portfolio/
Email: not published
terminal.historyEmpty: No commands in this session yet.
terminal.neofetch:
YeldoOS 1.0
User: Yeldo
Role: Frontend Developer
Shell: simulated-terminal
Locale: {locale}
Theme: {theme}
Projects: 5
terminal.gitStatus:
On branch main
Your portfolio content is organized and read-only.
Nothing here touches the visitor's filesystem.
terminal.gitLog:
feat: build YeldoOS browser workspace
feat: document independent projects honestly
chore: keep portfolio content bilingual
terminal.npmDev:
▲ Next.js development server (simulated)
✓ Ready on http://localhost:3000
Use `open portfolio` to view the public portfolio.
terminal.sudoRefusal: Permission denied: this terminal is a safe portfolio simulation.
terminal.sudoDestroy: Nice try. The simulated filesystem has filed a safety complaint.
terminal.coffee: Brewing… ☕ Error: coffee provider requires a real kitchen.
terminal.nasa: Access denied. Try building a good pull request instead.
terminal.exit: Terminal session minimized. Reopen it from the dock.

code.title: Portfolio filesystem
code.empty: Choose a file from the tree to inspect its content.
code.readOnlyDescription: Virtual content is intentionally read-only in the public portfolio.

skills.title: Skills with context
skills.subtitle: No arbitrary percentages. Each item shows how it appears in real project work or current learning.

timeline.title: Learning and project timeline
timeline.subtitle: Dates stay approximate where exact milestones are not publicly confirmed.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Direct public channels with no fake submission form.
contact.mailtoNote: A mail link will appear after an address is added to the profile configuration.

settings.title: System settings
settings.reducedMotionDescription: Removes nonessential movement throughout the workspace.
settings.soundDescription: Sound is off by default and never required for feedback.
settings.bootDescription: Show the short startup sequence on the next visit.
settings.simplifiedDescription: Show a conventional application list instead of desktop icons.
settings.resetLayoutDescription: Close all windows and restore default positions.
settings.resetAllDescription: Remove YeldoOS settings, windows, and achievements from this browser.

archive.title: Archive
archive.description: Projects are only moved here when their status is explicitly marked Archived.

error.title: YeldoOS encountered an error
error.description: The current view could not be rendered. Your stored settings are still available.
error.notFoundDescription: That path does not exist in this YeldoOS installation.
